description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered bottom and a standard aluminum pull-tab top. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its body, accompanied by a dynamic white wave design. The front prominently displays the 'Coca-Cola' logo, while the back features nutritional information, a barcode, and the volume marking of 12 FL OZ. The top is metallic silver with a standard ring pull tab, and the surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of aluminum beverage cans. There are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks, and the can's graphics are clear and intact. This object would commonly be found as litter or street trash in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or near public bins.
description: A red, glossy Coca-Cola can with white branding, a silver pull-tab top, and clear label details. The can is undamaged and features a barcode and nutritional information on the back.
description_view_0: The can's side shows a large white 'Coke' script and part of the white wave design on a red background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full 'Coca-Cola' script logo and the start of the nutritional label, with the white wave design curving around the can.
description_view_2: The back of the can displays the Coca-Cola logo, detailed nutritional information, a barcode, and the '12 FL OZ' marking.
description_view_3: The side view features the large 'Coke' script and a partial view of the barcode and label text.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with a dynamic wave design on a red background.
attribute_label_text: Coca-Cola, Coke, Trade-mark, CARBONATED WATER, SUGAR, CARAMEL COLOR, PHOSPHORIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVORS, CAFFEINE, CANNED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY, ATLANTA, GA 30313 BY COCA-COLA BOTTLERS, CONSUMER INFORMATION CALL 1-800-438-2653, 12 FL OZ
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
